name: Anytime Crunch Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9-inch square or round pan.
2. In a medium, microwave-safe bowl, combine the chocolate chips, half cup of peanut butter chips, and margarine.
3. Microwave on MEDIUM for 2-3 minutes, stirring halfway through cooking.
4. Stir until smooth. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract.
5. Add the crisp rice cereal and rolled oats; stir until well coated.
6. Press into the greased pan.
7. To prepare the glaze, in a small, microwave-safe bowl, combine the glaze ingredients.
8. Microwave on MEDIUM for 1-2 minutes, stirring until smooth.
9. Drizzle over the bars. If desired, refrigerate until set.
10. Cut into bars.
